channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog mess, 11th June
item.description:
Dog fouling every other day outside my house. Needs signs put up, with threats of fines issued.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car for sale on highway, 11th June
item.description:
This car has been left for sale outside my house. It has been there for at least 2 weeks already.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Elmers End Road, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in The Ice House, 11th June
item.description:
Hi. This is an ongoing problem. Please can all the litter be removed/swept up from the floor of The Ice House. We are picking up the bigger bits twice a day, but have nothing to grab the smaller items with. PLEASE HE CAREFUL AS WE HAVE FOUND LOTS OF TINY FROGS IN THE ICE HOUSE. We have been moving them to the undergrowth as they don’t seem to be able to find their way out of The Ice House once in there. They are tiny, smaller than house spiders, please be careful.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside chippenham gardens on Malvern Road, 11th June
item.description:
This medical chair has been blocking the pavement for weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Graffiti on ceiling of The Ice House, 11th June
item.description:
Please can the graffiti be removed from the ceiling of The Ice House. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bench in The Ice House, 11th June
item.description:
Please can the graffiti be removed from the bench. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More parking spaces, 11th June
item.description:
Please get rid of the zigzag school markings and make into more parking spaces that we desperately need. The school has been closed for years so no need for these markings anymore.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Big Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bench has had bolts removed, 11th June
item.description:
Please can the bolts be replaced as soon as possible as we don’t want this bench to end up in The Moat. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: M&S shopping trolley - Rafford Way entrance to park, 11th June
item.description:
Please can this trolley be collected. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rafford Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of cuttings behind bin, 11th June
item.description:
Please can these cuttings be removed. We’ve put them at the entrance to save you time and to prevent further damage to Carriage Drive. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping- Clothing & Rubbish left around bin, 11th June
item.description:
Clothing items & general waste left around our private Veolia Bin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 110-112, Tower Bridge Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van, 11th June
item.description:
This van has been here for months and has accumulated various parking tickets and detritus. It is taking up one of the (very few) spaces available outside the flats which some of us pay a hefty annual charge for. Please move the van or refund us the permit

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Big Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping- Clothing left around filled up charity bin, 11th June
item.description:
Clothing items left around filled up charity box. Creating foul smell

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104-108, Tower Bridge Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Refuse bags torn open, 11th June
item.description:
Refuse bins ripped open by rodents/animals with food waste left exposed. House seems empty and likely to have been dumped at property. At corner of Gloucester Road/Lancaster Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gloucester Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, Danson Underpass, 11th June
item.description:
There is a dead fox on the road at the Danson underpass, under the A2 flyover. Left side of the road, direction towards Danson Park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Underpass, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 11th June
item.description:
Bbb

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving stone (s), 11th June
item.description:
The paving stones are uneven and are not level . This particular one sticks up from the others and is enough to catch your foot and trip . There are others outside the dive that are cracked too . These have been like it for years but now my husband's mobility and sight is also poor it is necessary for me to report it for his safety in particular. Many thanks to you if you can attend to this

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazelmere Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow lines are faded, 11th June
item.description:
There is a parking restriction on the road but the lines are faded or non-existent. Also there are three driveways right at the front of the road but no double line. If a car parks here, it is dangerous and makes it difficult for vehicles to leave the driveways. It is only a spot for one car and plenty of parking on the rest of the road, so should be a double yellow line.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beechcroft, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fawley Road, opposite Chipotle Restaurant, 11th June
item.description:
Young tree has been probably hit by a car and the wooden support is broken, please restake the young tree so it grows straight and can support the wind.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fawley Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cement dried uneven & barrier abandoned, 11th June
item.description:
This barrier has been left here for about 3 weeks. The cement it was meant to be protecting before it fell over has dried with a big footprint or something making it uneven and trip hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Monteagle Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
